    S

    start() - Method in class fun.seabird.util.TextAreaAppender
    Initializes the TextAreaAppender by associating it with a TextArea from the MediaSorterApplication.
    start(Stage) - Method in class fun.seabird.app.MediaSorterApplication
    Builds and displays the primary application window.
    stop() - Method in class fun.seabird.app.MediaSorterApplication
